examples: So far, specialists have worked to add preservative materials to the churches' exteriors.
The preservative used is usually ethylene glycol or propylene glycol, as alcohol will evaporate quickly and the traps will dry out.
A pitfall trap can be any small container placed in the ground with the top level with the surrounding surface and filled with a preservative.
Vaccine companies are making vaccine types for both seasonal flu and H1N1 flu without this mercury-based preservative.
Thimerosal is a mercury-containing compound that has been used since the 1930s as a preservative in vaccines.
